movie.actors: Mimi Rogers, Darwyn Carson, Patrick Bauchau, Marvin Elkins
movie.plot: This is the story of a young woman (who lives in Los Angeles) with a very boring job. At night however, she and a male partner cruise the bars as swingers. After a time, she begins to believe that a conspiracy exists and decides that she must become a born-again Christian. The movie presents an interesting view of how even the most unlikely person might become born-again.
movie.title: The Rapture
